message:
ui: switch to GPUI action system and tighten accessibility

Replace window-level key handling with actions!/bind_keys, wiring focus/clear/submit/navigation/mode/copy/open/quit through on_action handlers. Add status in-flight flag and reconnect retry, focus-visible rings and tab stops for search input, mode buttons, clear button, and results rows. Keep list selection in view, throttle hover notify, and allow snippet scrolling.
